name: Minhal ibn Amr
title: Narrator of the Answered Prayer
shortDescription: The man who asked Imam Sajjad (AS) about his condition in the Damascus markets and later witnessed the fulfillment of his curse on Harmala.
fullStory: Minhal ibn Amr encountered Imam Sajjad (AS) in the markets of Damascus and sorrowfully asked: "O son of the Messenger of Allah, how do you fare?" The Imam gave a heartbreaking response about the captives' plight. Years later in Kufa, Minhal visited Imam Sajjad (AS), who asked about the fate of Harmala (the killer of Ali Asghar) and prayed that he burns in fire. Upon returning to Kufa, Minhal found Mukhtar in power and personally witnessed Harmala being captured and cast into the fire.
quote: O son of the Messenger of Allah, how have you welcomed the morning?
